title: QuantumScape and PowerCo Expand Collaboration to Accelerate Solid-State Battery Technology Commercialization
text: QuantumScape has expanded its strategic collaboration and licensing arrangement with PowerCo SE, the battery company of the Volkswagen Group, originally entered into in July 2024. Under the terms, PowerCo will provide up to $131 million in new payments over the next two years upon the joint scale-up team achieving certain milestones. The updated collaboration agreement is designed to accelerate the QSE-5 battery development pilot line in San Jose, marking a major step forward in the industrialization of solid-state battery technology. In June 2025, the company integrated the proprietary Cobra separator manufacturing process into baseline production. The expansion will allow PowerCo the right under the licensing agreement to produce up to an additional 5 gigawatt-hours (GWh) of QSE-5-based cells annually, including for customers outside the Volkswagen Group, and the right to license certain future QS technology. QuantumScape expects to ship sample cells for testing in 2026, with commercial production potentially beginning between 2027 and 2028, depending on regulatory approvals and manufacturing scaling.
